# Project Handoff Manager (Uplizd) - Automate seamless project transitions and team handoffs

## Summary
The Project Handoff Manager is an intelligent Uplizd workflow designed to bridge the gap between project completion and new team onboarding. By automating the transfer of documentation, status updates, and task assignments from Process Street into your project management ecosystem, this solution eliminates information silos, reduces manual administrative overhead, and ensures that incoming teams have a single source of truth for immediate productivity.

---
